package rulefixtures

import (
	"fmt"
)

// scenario for fmt_fprintln_to_bytes_buffer: `fmt.Fprintln(&buf, ...)` instead of direct buffer writes.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario488Positive(values []int) []string {
	out := make([]string, 0, len(values))
	for _, value := range values {
		out = append(out, fmt.Sprintf("%d", value))
	}
	return out
}
